title: koeleria cristata f. includens
intro: Koeleria cristata f. includens, also known as bluebunch wheatgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a perennial grass that is native to North America and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Koeleria cristata f. includens include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as dried powder, tea, or capsules, and is often used in traditional medicine and as a dietary supplement.
